items.title: CVE-2025-24054: NTLM Hash Disclosure in Windows Explorer
items.summary: A critical spoofing vulnerability in Windows Explorer allows attackers to capture NTLM hashes via a malicious .library-ms file, requiring minimal user interaction. CVSS score 8.8. Actively exploited in the wild according to CISA KEV.

items.title: CVE-2025-29824: Windows CLFS Driver Privilege Escalation
items.summary: A use-after-free vulnerability in the Windows Common Log File System driver allows local privilege escalation to SYSTEM. Exploited by ransomware groups in targeted attacks. Patch immediately on all Windows Server instances.

items.title: CVE-2025-30065: Apache Parquet RCE via Malicious Schema
items.summary: Deserialisation of untrusted data in Apache Parquet Java allows remote code execution when reading a crafted Parquet file. Affects all versions up to 1.15.0. Critical for data pipelines ingesting external Parquet files.

items.title: CISA KEV: Gladinet CentreStack Hardcoded Key RCE (CVE-2025-30406)
items.summary: Gladinet CentreStack contains a hardcoded cryptographic key vulnerability enabling remote code execution. Added to CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalogue. Federal agencies required to patch by May 2025.

items.title: CVE-2025-1974: Ingress-NGINX Unauthenticated RCE
items.summary: A critical unauthenticated RCE in ingress-nginx allows attackers to inject arbitrary NGINX configuration via the admission controller. Affects Kubernetes clusters with ingress-nginx installed. Patch to v1.12.1 or v1.11.5 immediately.
